hero.subtitle: Freelance web & mobile developer based in Switzerland. I design and build showcase websites, mobile apps and custom CMS solutions.

about.title:
Passionate about code,
obsessed with details.
about.description_1: I'm Antoine Quarroz, a web & mobile developer based in Valais, Switzerland. With expertise in modern technologies, I transform your ideas into high-performance, beautiful digital products.
about.description_2: My approach combines technical rigor and design sensibility to deliver solutions that not only work perfectly, but also impress visually.
about.quote: A strong digital presence shouldn't just look good: it needs to explain, reassure and trigger a contact.
about.approach_1_text: Clarify the message and the conversion path.
about.approach_2_text: Create a premium, readable and credible interface.
about.approach_3_text: Ship fast with a clean technical foundation.
